exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 60kg × 9 on 2026-03-24 — conservative restart at 60kg to re-establish form and provide secondary front delt stimulus

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 50kg × 10 on 2026-04-13 — hold 50kg for controlled compound pulling

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.suggestion_note: Rear delt priority for shoulder balance correction — light weight, high reps, focus on mind-muscle connection and scapular retraction

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 25kg × 8 on 2026-04-13 — hold 25kg to accumulate quality bicep volume at MEV

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Underhand Tricep Extension
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 7.5kg × 10 on 2026-04-20 — shoulder-safe unilateral tricep isolation, maintain neutral arm position

notes: Warm-up: band external rotations 2×15/arm + band pull-aparts 2×15 before working sets. Rear delt volume = 3 sets (Face Pull) toward weekly MEV of 6 total. Front delt indirect stimulus from bench press secondary activation only — no direct front delt work. Tempo 3-1-2 (eccentric-pause-concentric), stop 3–4 reps from failure. Monitor shoulder — zero sharp pain above 3/10. Nutrition: 2800 kcal + 155g protein.
